description: A comma separated list of CVE IDs to search.

outputs.description: The ID of the CVE. CVE.CVSS The CVSS score of the CVE.
outputs.name: CVE.ID

outputs.description: Date The date the CVE was published. CVE.Modified
outputs.name: CVE.Published

outputs.description: The date the CVE was last modified. CVE.Description The description of the CVE.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: The indicator value. DBotScore.Score The indicator score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor reporting the score of the indicator.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type
